nasb.text: And Jeroboam slept with his fathers, even with the kings of Israel, and Zechariah his son became king in his place.

esv.text: And Jeroboam slept with his fathers, the kings of Israel, and Zechariah his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 耶羅波安和他的祖先以色列諸王一同長眠。他的兒子撒迦利雅就接續他作王。

ccb.text: 耶罗波安与祖先——以色列的先王们同眠后，他儿子撒迦利雅继位。
